title: Even Better Enchants
body:
![Page Banner previewing all the textures this resource pack contains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed9f3936018a1502c38431e21e3f3099c152610e.png)
Support for 1.21, 1.20, 1.19, 1.18 & 1.17

**1.21.5 and above:** _NO DEPENDENCIES REQUIRED!_

**1.21.4 and below:** Requires [CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) **or** [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) **or** [EnchantedBookEnabler](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantedbookenabler-datapack)

---

### ABOUT


Even Better Enchants is a resource pack which provides a unique book texture for each enchantment, with a vanilla-like asethetic. Bazinga.

---

### CREDIT

This is a edit & continuation of the resource pack ["Better Enchant Books"](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/yomny-pack-better-enchanted-book/) by Yomna, involving edits of existing textures, textures for 1.19 and 1.21 enchants, and releases for newer versions of minecraft. Publishing was done with permission.

---

#### USAGE IN MODPACKS
Sure, but give credit by name and link to this project

---

Thanks, and have fun
